input.audience: Filipino healthcare workers in their late 20s preparing for Canadian PR. They've already been working as nurses in Manila, are bilingual, balancing clinical shifts with study at home.
input.concept: An aspirational moment showing a candidate calmly finishing the test on her laptop with morning light, conveying control and progress.

copy.headline: Elevate Your Career in Canada
copy.subhead: Achieve your Canadian dream with CELPIP, the trusted English test for skilled healthcare workers seeking permanent residency.

features.title: Tailored for Professionals
features.desc: CELPIP focuses on real-life English skills, perfect for healthcare workers aiming to excel in Canada.

features.title: Flexible Testing Options
features.desc: Choose from various test dates and locations, fitting your busy schedule as a working nurse.

features.title: Supportive Learning Resources
features.desc: Access helpful study materials and practice tests to build your confidence before the exam.

testimonials.name: Maria Reyes
testimonials.quote: Preparing for CELPIP while working was challenging, but I felt ready and supported. I scored CLB 8 and got my PR!

testimonials.name: Juan Dela Cruz
testimonials.quote: CELPIP helped me improve my English skills for my nursing career. I finished the test feeling confident and calm.

faqs.a: CELPIP is an English language proficiency test that assesses your reading, writing, listening, and speaking skills. It's recognised by IRCC for Canadian immigration.

faqs.q: How can I prepare for CELPIP?
faqs.a: You can prepare by using official study materials, taking practice tests, and attending preparation courses designed for healthcare professionals.

faqs.q: What scores are needed for PR?
faqs.a: For skilled immigration to Canada, a CLB score of 7 or higher is often required. Check the IRCC website for specific requirements.

copy.adTagline: CELPIP prepares you for your future in Canada.
